name: AutoDeafen (macOS)
description: The first working Discord auto-deafen for macOS. Mutes Discord while you grind.

enabled.name: Enabled
enabled.description: Master switch for the auto-deafen behaviour.

min-percent.name: Minimum Percent
min-percent.description: Discord will only be deafened once you reach this percentage of the level (0-100).

undeafen-on-death.name: Undeafen On Death
undeafen-on-death.description: If enabled, Discord is undeafened when you die. Otherwise it stays deafened until you exit the level.

client-id.name: Discord Client ID
client-id.description: The Client ID of YOUR Discord application (create one for free at https://discord.com/developers/applications). Required to talk to Discord over IPC.

client-secret.name: Discord Client Secret
client-secret.description: The Client Secret of your Discord application. Used once to obtain an OAuth token; stored locally afterwards.
